title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II-B. CATALYTIC CONVERTER TRANSFERS

§1891. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Catalytic Converter Transfer Law".

            Acts 2022, No. 584, §1; Acts 2023, No. 373, §1.
doc_text:
PART II-B.  CATALYTIC CONVERTER TRANSFERS
§1891.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Catalytic Converter
Transfer Law".
Acts 2022, No. 584, §1; Acts 2023, No. 373, §1.
